category_sources: Official homepage https://hbase.apache.org/ describes Apache HBase as a distributed, scalable big data store for random realtime read/write access.
source_facts.description says HBase is a Hadoop database and distributed scalable big data store.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading and trademark footer use Apache HBase.
docs_sources: Official HBase homepage Documentation and API section links to the Reference Guide as the primary documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Source Repository page states developer Git access is https://gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf/hbase.git and browser access is gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf?p=hbase.git.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes distributed scalable big data storage, realtime read/write access, and being built on Hadoop.
source_facts.executables include hbase and start/stop scripts.
